chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-178 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 553/25 2.For orders on CMA 554/25 3.For hearing of main case 28-07-2025 None present for the petitioner. **** 1. Urgency application is dismissed as having become infructuous. 2. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. Petitioner, who maintains this petition in person, is called absent. However, by way of instant petition, petitioner seeks direction to official respondents to provide protection and not to cause any sort of harassment to him and his family at the behest of private respondents. Prior to this, petitioner had also approached learned Justice of Peace, Moro by filing Crl. Misc. Application No.4791 of 2024, which was disposed of vide order dated 11.12.2024. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kubar, Assistant A.G present in Court in other matters while waiving notice submits that official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of a/w listed applications with directions to the official respondents to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection to the petitioner. However, it is made clear that this order shall not come in the way either in criminal, civil or family cases, if pending between both the parties before the competent Courts of law. JUDGE Ahmad
